name: Backend Developer
description: Build scalable server-side systems, RESTful APIs, and distributed architectures using modern languages and cloud infrastructure.

phases.title: Core Backend Foundations
items: 💻 Master Python (or Go/Java): data structures, OOP, concurrency, error handling
🌐 Understand HTTP/HTTPS, RESTful API design principles, status codes
🗄️ Learn SQL and a relational database (PostgreSQL): modeling, queries, indexing
🔧 Set up a web framework (FastAPI, Django, or Express.js) with routing & middleware
📦 Use Git, virtual environments (venv/poetry), and dependency management
🧪 Write unit and integration tests with pytest, unittest, or Jest

phases.title: APIs, Databases & Scaling
items: 🔌 Build production REST APIs with authentication (JWT, OAuth2)
🗄️ Deepen database skills: migrations (Alembic), ORMs (SQLAlchemy, Prisma)
📐 Learn caching strategies (Redis, CDN), rate limiting, pagination
☁️ Containerize apps with Docker, write Docker Compose for multi-service setups
⚡ Optimize query performance: EXPLAIN ANALYZE, connection pooling, N+1 fixes

phases.title: Production Systems & Architecture
items: 🏗️ Design microservices vs monoliths, message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka)
☁️ Deploy to cloud (AWS EC2/ECS, GCP Cloud Run, or Railway)
🔧 Set up CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI) with automated tests
🛡️ Apply security best practices: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, rate limiting, secrets management
💼 Build a capstone project: multi-service backend with docs, tests, and CI/CD
